title: Mastering Vertical Rhythm for Impeccable UI/UX and Readability
tweet: Elevate your UI/UX! Learn how to master vertical rhythm with CSS for consistent layouts, enhanced readability, and beautiful web fonts. #CSSTypography #WebDesign #UX
tip: Achieve visual harmony and superior readability by establishing a robust vertical rhythm in your UI. Use a consistent base unit (like 'rem') for your 'line-height' and vertical spacing, ensuring all elements align to an invisible grid. This creates a predictable and pleasant reading experience, especially with custom #WebFonts.
